main.title: Home
main.description: Interslavic Lexicon — the Interslavic lexicon. Search, grammar, translation and learning materials.
main.heading: Interslavic Linguistic Corpus and Lexicon
main.subtitle: An integrated research platform for automated natural language processing (NLP) and comparative analysis of Slavic language systems. It combines a verified lexicon of Proto-Slavic roots, a multilingual parallel corpus and a semantic relation graph.

orthography.title: Multi-script Orthographic Conversion
orthography.description: Dynamic transliteration of text between Cyrillic and Latin (scientific isv-notation) writing systems. The module provides automatic adaptation of lexeme display and phonetic transcription (IPA) to the user's local metadata.

morpheme.title: Morpheme-Semantic Mapping
morpheme.description: Decomposition of lexemes into derivational morphemes and integration into a multi-level knowledge graph. The system assigns weights to synonymic, antonymic and root proximity of entities, visualizing clusters of cognates and Proto-Slavic etymological links.

crosslingual.title: Cross-lingual Lexical Alignment
crosslingual.description: Comparative analysis and semantic mapping of Interslavic lexemes with parallel denotations in 16 living Slavic languages. The architecture supports strict relational verification and validation of translation equivalents by the expert community.

corpus.title: Parallel Linguistic Corpus
corpus.description: Full-text and lexico-syntactic search across segmented text corpora (KWIC). The system supports morphological tagging (POS-tagging) and accounts for statistical frequency metrics of word-form usage for precise result ranking.

cta.title: Want to contribute to the lexicon?
cta.description: Register to gain access to basic features or request moderator privileges.

lexicon.title: Lexicon
lexicon.description: Search the Interslavic dictionary. Meanings, translations, grammatical forms, etymology and cognate words.
lexicon.guestBanner: When translating from Interslavic, the locale is automatically adjusted to your browser locale.

translate.title: Translate
translate.description: Translate from Interslavic into 16 Slavic and non-Slavic languages with active links to explanatory dictionaries.
translate.guestBanner: When translating from Interslavic, the locale is automatically adjusted to your browser locale.

library.title: Sbornik / Library
library.description: A collection of selected texts in Interslavic.
library.backLink: ← Vratiti se do biblioteky / Back to library
library.emptyBody: Text has not been added yet.

corpus.title: Text Corpus
corpus.description: Search the Interslavic text corpus. Concordance and analysis of word usage in parallel texts.

transliteration.title: Transliterator
transliteration.description: Convert text between Interslavic writing systems: etymological, standard and simple (Latin and Cyrillic).
transliteration.heading: Transliterator
transliteration.subtitle: Convert text between Interslavic writing systems. All conversions pass through etymological Latin.

about.title: About
about.description: Technical information about the Interslavic Lexicon project — word count, meanings, roots, supported translation languages and environment details.
about.heading: About / Specification
about.intro: The electronic lexicon is a specialized relational database of the Interslavic language (Medžuslovjansky). The program is designed to automate multilingual translation processes, analyze etymological nests and manage the morphemic composition of words.
about.orthographyText: The program supports dynamic switching of writing systems without page reloads. Detection and output follow these rules:
orthographyRules: When an active user session exists, the configuration from the user_settings table in the auth database is applied.
For unauthenticated users, the HTTP Accept-Language header of the browser locale is parsed, with automatic detection of Latin locales for Slavic countries (pl, cs, sk, hr, sl).
Latin transliteration follows the standard Interslavic alphabet notation (**isv**), including special characters (č, ž, š, ě).
about.projectsIntro: Recommended external resources and official Interslavic community platforms that complement the lexicon infrastructure:

projects.portal: The main informational website of the language: grammar, history, rules and standards.
projects.dictionary: A multilingual dictionary web service and database developed by community members.
projects.community: The largest official international community for communication, practice and coordination of Interslavic language development.
projects.wiki: An open knowledge base and wiki encyclopedia of articles, written and moderated by community members.

about.contactsDescription: If you find an inaccuracy in a dictionary entry translation, want to suggest an improvement to transliteration algorithms, or request extended moderator privileges (with access to specific language groups), contact us:
about.openSourceDesc: The project and architectural developments of the lexicon are published in the community GitHub repository.
about.historyIntro: Evolution of the project's web version:

versions.v1desc: The first database of Novoslovnica words and initial codification of lexical norms.
versions.v2desc: Transition to online format, launch of the web version and database expansion.
versions.v4desc: Current version. Complete architecture overhaul, modern interface and ecosystem tools. Formation of the Interslavic text corpus.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Account settings and personalization of the Interslavic lexicon display — choose Cyrillic or Latin script, site theme, default language.
settings.heading: Account Settings
settings.subtitle: Personalize the Interslavic lexicon display to your preferences.
settings.scriptDescription: Choose which writing system (script) to use by default for displaying Interslavic words in lexicon interfaces and tables.
settings.themeDescription: Choose a site theme. System automatically follows your operating system settings.
settings.languageDescription: Choose the default interface and translation language. This setting does not yet affect functionality but will be used in the future.

login.title: Log In
login.description: Log in via Yandex or Google to access settings and management.

changelog.title: Istorija versij / Version History
changelog.description: History of changes to the Interslavic Lexicon platform.
changelog.heading: Istorija versij / Version History

v40items: Parsing and structuring data from authoritative dictionaries
Dictionary search with real-time translation into 16 languages
Management of synonyms, antonyms and cognate words
Complete grammatical paradigm: declensions, conjugations, degrees of comparison
Support for Latin and Cyrillic script with dynamic switching
v41items: Flavorization tracking (Latinica / Kirilica) and script selection in texts
9 new relation types between words from synsets
Inflectional variability and extended morphological rules
Verification markers and change approval system
Complete action history for lexemes and morphemes
Enriched external data and etymological links
v42items: Addition of text library with admin panel
Markdown format and rich text formatting
Search and filtering of texts by category
Contribution tracking (who added the text) and change history
Metadata: source, year written, translation, flavorization (CORE/NSL/EAST/WEST/SOUTH)

textbook.loadingDesc: Full grammar reference, declension examples, paradigms and self-assessment audio materials will be expanded here.
textbook.emptyChapter: Materials for this subsection are being synchronized with the Interslavic manual.

chapters.ch5: 5. Verbs to be and to have
chapters.ch6: 6. Interrogative sentences. Yes and no. Negation

chapter1.title: Pronunciation and alphabet
chapter1.description: Basic reading rules, writing systems (Latin and Cyrillic) and phonetic structure of Interslavic.

subsections.basicsText: Interslavic is designed in a balanced way, allowing the use of both the Latin alphabet (isv-Latin) and Cyrillic. The systems are completely equivalent, and the choice depends solely on context and user preference.

chapter1.factText: Thanks to a mathematically calibrated root system, knowing the pronunciation rules, a speaker of any Slavic language will understand up to 80% of spoken speech without prior training!

proto.title: Proto-Slavic Dictionary
proto.description: Search the Proto-Slavic dictionary (ESSJa — Etymological Dictionary of Slavic Languages edited by O. N. Trubachyov). Lemmas, reconstructions and historical contexts.
proto.heading: Proto-Slavic Dictionary (ESSJa)

morpheme.heading: Morpheme analysis
morpheme.unavailable: Morpheme analysis unavailable — root data missing

admin.title: Admin Panel
admin.description: Interslavic dictionary management panel. Edit entries, manage synonyms, antonyms and roots.

antonyms.title: Antonyms
antonyms.description: Manage antonyms at the meaning level. Search and link opposite meanings of words.
antonyms.heading: Antonym Management
antonyms.instruction: Select a word, then its meaning, to link opposite meanings of other words to it.
antonyms.emptyAntonyms: Antonym list is empty. Use the search below to add opposite meanings.
antonyms.selectMeaning: Select a word meaning to manage antonyms
antonyms.selectWord: Select a word or find it via search on the left to create links from scratch

synonyms.title: Synonyms
synonyms.description: Manage synonyms at the meaning level. Search and link synonymous meanings of words.
synonyms.heading: Synonym Management
synonyms.instruction: Select a word, then its meaning, to link synonymous meanings of other words to it.
synonyms.emptySynonyms: Synonym list is empty. Use the search below to add meanings from scratch.
synonyms.searchSynonymPlaceholder: Start typing a word to search for synonyms...
synonyms.selectMeaning: Select a word meaning to manage synonyms
synonyms.selectWord: Select a word or find it via search on the left to create links from scratch

relations.heading: Manage {label}
relations.instruction: Select a word, then its meaning, to {description}.

deleteModal.title: Delete confirmation

candidates.description: Manage candidates for the Interslavic lexicon.

candidates.subtitle: Words proposed for addition to the dictionary. Review and transfer to the main table.
candidates.searchPlaceholder: Search by value, isv or nsl...

promoteModal.title: Promote to dictionary
promoteModal.instruction: Fill in the fields for each candidate. Slug will be generated as value-pos.

deleteModal.title: Delete confirmation

deleteModal.title: Delete confirmation
deleteModal.confirmText: Are you sure you want to delete record ID: {id}?

deduplication.title: Deduplication
deduplication.description: Eliminate duplicates in the lexicon (not homonyms).
deduplication.heading: Database Deduplication (Relational Structure)
deduplication.subtitle: Cascade transfer of meanings, synonyms, antonyms and root links.
deduplication.searchPlaceholder: Search by value or isv (minimum 2 characters)...
deduplication.searchPrompt: Enter a string to search for duplicates
deduplication.success: Objects merged. Meanings and links transferred cascadingly.

mergeModal.title: Merge Records Constructor
mergeModal.description: Meanings and links will be transferred to the retained ID.
mergeModal.info: 💡 **Info:** All language translations (Ru, En, Pl...) are linked to Meaning records. Since the updateMany command transfers the value objects themselves entirely to the new word's ID, the structure and links of your translations will be preserved without changes or conflicts at the DB level.
